mood: Premium but warm, artisanal, authentic Italian, appetizing, fresh

fonts.name: Cormorant Garamond
fonts.usage: H1, H2, H3, large display text

rules.headings: Tight letter spacing, elegant weights (font-light or font-semibold).
rules.hierarchy: H1 text-5xl to text-6xl. H2 text-3xl to text-4xl.

layout_and_spacing.container: Max width 7xl, generous padding (p-8 to p-16) to let content breathe.
layout_and_spacing.grids: Use Bento Grid protocol (Tetris mode) for experience and trust sections.
layout_and_spacing.corners: Soft, organic roundness (rounded-2xl to rounded-3xl) to feel tactile and artisanal.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Very soft, ambient shadows. Avoid harsh dark shadows.

components.hero: Large immersive image on one side or background, clear typography, two distinct CTAs (Primary: Soft Pistachio bg, Secondary: Outline).
components.trust_cards: Flat background with subtle 1px border (#EBE3D5), earthy icons. Use lucide-react icons.
components.product_cards: Image-heavy, soft corners, title in Cormorant Garamond.
components.contact_form: Shadcn based but heavily customized to match the Organic theme (no harsh black borders, use deep brown for focus rings).

hero.description: High-end cinematic photograph of artisanal gelato cone

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all copy is exclusively in Italian ('Solo italiano').
Use framer-motion for smooth section reveal animations (fade in and slight translate-y).
Ensure the Google Maps iframe is responsive and matches the theme aesthetics (e.g., wrap in a rounded container with a warm border).
Include data-testid attributes for all interactive and key elements.
Form must be functional and visually customized using Tailwind classes (avoid Shadcn default black borders, use the defined color palette).
Do not use generic sans-serif for headings; strictly use Cormorant Garamond or a similar elegant serif.
Use the specific media URLs provided. Do not use generic placeholders.
